description_long: This is a small wooden cabin constructed primarily from horizontally stacked logs, giving it a rustic and traditional appearance. The roof is steeply pitched and made from overlapping wooden planks, forming a classic gable shape. The cabin stands on four short legs, slightly elevating it above the ground. There is a single rectangular window on each of the longer sides, and a single rectangular door on one gable end, with a small wooden porch or step leading up to the entrance. The wood is a warm, medium-brown color, and the construction appears simple yet sturdy, suitable for a park or residential garden setting. The interior is visible through the open door, revealing a simple, unfurnished space.
description: A small, rustic wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, log walls, and a single door with a porch. It features rectangular windows on the sides and stands slightly elevated on short legs.
description_view_0: The gable end of the cabin is visible, showing the log construction and the solid wooden wall with no openings.
description_view_1: This side view displays a rectangular window and the side of the steeply pitched roof, with the porch or step visible on the right.
description_view_2: The front of the cabin is shown, featuring the main door, the porch or step, and a glimpse of the interior floor.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals another rectangular window and the side of the roof, with the porch or step extending from the left.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof constructed from overlapping wooden planks, steeply pitched with no overhangs or dormers
attribute_window_arrangement: Two medium-sized rectangular windows, one on each of the longer sides, symmetrically placed and single in number per side
attribute_door_placement: A single rectangular door centered on one gable end, accessed by a small porch or step
